items.title: Did you know you can’t steal a charity? Don’t worry. Elon Musk will remind you.

items.title: Chance AI Lands $3M Seed Funding
items.summary: NEW YORK, NY, Chance AI, a visual AI startup founded by former ByteDance executive Xi Zeng, has raised $3 million in seed funding.
